- Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering? [ ] Yes  [X] No

- Date of Report Being Amended: (blank)
- Received stamp: AUG 06 2020; Legislative Resource Center, 2020 AUG 17 PM 12:06, Office of the Clerk U.S. House of Representatives; handwritten "MC"

Transaction grid on this page contains only the greyed Example row (JT — Mega Corp. Common Stock, Sale, 02/05/2015, 03/07/15, amount B) and the header "**Please see the attached**" with empty checkbox rows. No real transaction data on this page.
